candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales across years and is the clearest total revenue line.
Not revenue; cost line.
Non-operating/other gain, not core revenue.
Operating profit, not revenue.
Finance income, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Non-GAAP operating profit, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenue from contracts with customers
candidates.why: Balance sheet working-capital asset, not income statement revenue.
Balance sheet liability/working-capital item, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability concept, not reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the income statement. Although 'Net sales' also appears and matches numerically, the candidate list includes 'Total Revenue', which is the cleaner top-line mapping.

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below revenue; matches the total cost-of-revenues amount across years.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold and services
candidates.why: Semantically similar but appears unpopulated in preview; likely alternate label, lower priority than populated direct cost line.
Total cost-of-revenues line equal to Cost of services sold; subtotal/total should be avoided when component exists.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods sold and services

variables.notes: OI:c. Preferred the direct cost component over the matching total/subtotal line 'Cost of Revenues - Total'.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket; likely includes external/admin/selling costs.
Personnel/overhead expense and a standard SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; exclude FX-specific subrows and keep the aggregate non-total overhead line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected granular overhead buckets and included the dedicated R&D line so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D if separately reported. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, finance items, FX subcomponents, and totals/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D line available; appropriate for XRD.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below EBIT as a supplemental disclosure, so it is suitable for XRD; it was also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS per the subtraction rule.

candidates.why: Broad total finance cost line, but includes non-interest items such as FX and other finance costs; use only if granular recurring components are insufficient.

Core interest expense line; best primary XINT component.

Asset, not equity.

Includes non-controlling interests; fallback only if owner equity unavailable.
Shareholder count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list. Avoided income statement attribution rows. BE uses owner-attributable equity, so including MIB separately does not double count.
